name: KrillApp.Server.SerialDevice
title: Serial Device
description: Communicates with hardware devices connected via serial ports (USB, UART). Supports read and write operations with configurable baud rate, data bits, parity, stop bits, flow control, encoding, and line terminator. Can send commands to devices and receive data. Integrates with Zigbee networks, Adafruit QTPY, Atlas Scientific, and other serial-based sensors and microcontrollers.
shortDescription: Communicates with hardware devices via serial ports with configurable protocol settings.
llmPurpose: Reads from and writes to hardware devices connected via serial ports (USB, UART) with configurable communication protocol settings.
llmBehavior: configurable baud rate, data bits, parity, stop bits, flow control
can feed data to DataPoints and receive commands from executors
llmInputs: send command string for read operations
llmTypicalUseCases: read sensor data from USB device
llmCreationHints: Create a SerialDevice when the user has hardware connected via USB or UART serial port. Configure the port path, baud rate, and operation mode. Typically auto-detected by the server.

llmConnectionHints.role: hardware interface node that reads from and writes to serial devices

llmExamples: Connect to the Zigbee coordinator on USB.
Set up a serial sensor on this server.
